disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A single larger 'herald' patch preceded a widespread eruption of oval scaly spots with an inner collarette of scale, following skin cleavage lines
trigger_question_examples: Did a single larger patch appear first, then lots of smaller oval spots with a fine rim of scale?
Do the ovals line up along the skin's natural lines on your back?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, a single larger patch came first, then lots of smaller oval spots with a fine inner rim of scale, lined up along my back.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Palms and soles are clear, no mouth sores, no widespread swollen glands (systemic/mucosal screen)
trigger_question_examples: Are your palms and soles involved, any mouth sores, or generally swollen glands?
Any risk factors or systemic symptoms?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my palms and soles are clear, no mouth sores, and no swollen glands — I feel well otherwise.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No new medications before the rash (drug-eruption screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any new medicines started before the rash?
Did you begin any new tablets or antibiotics in the past few weeks?
